content.en:
After unanimous consent, the Supremes began to determine the number of places.

Of course, the nine supreme-level forces naturally would not give up their places, but would give up one of the six places in the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race to Ye Tian.

When this is done, the meeting ends.

Not long after, Ye Tian received a notice from the Kunwu Supreme and asked him to go to the Kunwu Palace.

Under the leadership of the Dark Lord, Ye Tian came to the Kunwu Hall and met the Kunwu Supreme.

"I've seen the Kungo Supreme!"

Ye Tian greeted the Kunwu Supreme very respectfully.

Kunwu Supreme looked at Ye Tian and said in a deep voice: "Ye Tian, I came to you this time because I had a great opportunity for you. Originally, this great opportunity was not for you, but after the struggle of several supremes, I finally got you a place!"

"Great chance!"

Ye Tian's expression moved, revealing interest.

Kunwu Supreme said that it was a great opportunity, and it must be a useful opportunity for him, otherwise there was no need to call him!

Of course, he can be regarded as a person who has seen big scenes, and he has even been to places like the Ruins World, so he is quite calm.

"Kunwu Supreme, what is the great opportunity?"

Ye Tian asked calmly.

"Heavenly Dao Fragment World!"

Kunwu Supreme said.

"Heavenly Dao Fragment World? What is that?" Ye Tian heard about it for the first time, and was very curious.

"Do you know where the Heavenly Dao Script was born?" said the Kunwu Supreme with a smile.

"Could it be...... Heavenly Dao Fragment World?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"That's good!" Kun Wu Supreme nodded, "The Heavenly Dao text was born from the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, and the Heavenly Dao Fragment World is said to be a special world evolved from some superfluous cosmic origins at the beginning of the birth of the universe, and there are not many such Heavenly Dao Fragment Worlds, and it is very difficult to find. Even our human race only has one Heavenly Dao Fragment World. In this Heavenly Dao Fragment World, some Heavenly Dao characters are born every few years. Of course, it is not so easy to obtain these Heavenly Dao Texts, and you need to defeat the Heavenly Dao Guardians to obtain the Heavenly Dao Texts. "

"Heavenly Dao Guardian?"

Ye Tian didn't know about this, but under the narration of the Kunwu Supreme, he gradually understood the so-called Heavenly Dao Guardian.

The so-called Heavenly Dao Guardian is a kind of spirit evolved from the power of Heavenly Dao words, similar to spirits such as illusory elves and machine spirits!

This kind of spirit is only for the protection of the Heavenly Dao Script, and if you don't kill the Heavenly Dao Guardian, you can't get the Heavenly Dao Script.

And the strange thing is that in the world of Heavenly Dao fragments, the power of the Heavenly Dao text is extremely terrifying, if a strong person above the god level enters the scope of the Heavenly Dao text, the cultivation will be suppressed, and it will not be able to exert it at all, and other law powers will also be completely suppressed, and only the law power represented by this Heavenly Dao text can be exerted.

For example, within the scope of the Heavenly Dao of Fire text, a martial artist can only exert the power of the law of fire, and can cast fire supernatural powers, but cannot cast water supernatural powers.

Therefore, even if it is a strong person with high cultivation, he may not be able to obtain the Heavenly Dao Script.

Only martial artists with high attainments in certain laws and special means can obtain Heavenly Dao Characters in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World.

"Kunwu Supreme, is there a time and space Heavenly Dao text in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World?"

Ye Tian couldn't help but ask.

The ordinary Heavenly Dao text is really not very useful to him, but the use of the Time and Space Heavenly Dao text is too great!

Kunwu Supreme shook his head and said, "I don't know, in fact, the Supremes can't enter the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, this is due to the suppression of the Universe Origin, and the Supremes can't compete with the Universe Origin." And the martial artists who had entered the Heavenly Dao Fragment World did not really understand the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, because the Heavenly Dao Fragment World was so large that it seemed to be boundless. There are even rumors that the Heavenly Dao Fragment Worlds in various parts of the universe are connected, but the distance is too far away, so no two Heavenly Dao Fragment Worlds martial artists have ever met together. As for whether this rumor is true or not, it is not clear. But there is one thing you need to keep in mind that the area you enter from the entrance is the easiest to find the Heavenly Dao Text, and if you fly far away, you will hardly find the Heavenly Dao Text. As for why this is happening, I don't know!"

"It's amazing!"

Ye Tian became even more curious about the Heavenly Dao Fragment World.

Then, Ye Tian learned a lot of basic information about the Heavenly Dao Fragment World from Kunwu Supreme Being, such as everyone could only stay in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World for one year, and after one year, the world would be moved out.

In addition, the entrance to the Heavenly Dao Fragment World is opened once every 500,000 years, and the number of martial artists sent in each time is fixed.

For example, in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World controlled by the Terrans, the quota for this entrance is 33, and the nine supreme-level forces occupy a total of 27 places, each force has three places, and the Terran Supreme Hall occupies six places.

Originally, as a god-level, he didn't have a quota, but he was given a quota by an exception.

Now, there are still three months left before the Heavenly Dao Fragment World.

Three months isn't a long time, but it's not a short time either.

Ye Tian was going to use these three months to improve his strength, and in the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, many methods could not be used, but there was one method that could not be restricted, and that was physical strength.

Physical power is one's own, not an external one, and it is difficult to be limited.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to improve his physical strength.

Other powerhouses above the god level can't improve their physical body, but he can use the eighteen golden body techniques to improve the strength and strength of his physical body, and now that he has practiced the first three sets, he can completely inherit the fourth set of movements.

Day 2.

Ye Tian entered the inheritance space of the Six Paths of Reincarnation Tower, posed the fourth set of actions, and in the time acceleration environment, he successfully obtained the inheritance method of the fourth set of actions in just a moment.

After coming back, Ye Tian used his time acceleration ability to practice the fourth set of movements.

After cultivating day by day, the fourth set of movements was finally cultivated to the entry realm by Ye Tian, and the strength of his physical body was once again raised to a new level.

Now, Ye Tian didn't know how powerful he was, although he was still at the level of the Supreme Highness, he was far more powerful than the ordinary Supreme Highness.

It's a pity that there is only one Supreme Highness like him now, and it is difficult to compare with others, so there is no reference object, and there is no way to estimate his strength.

In the blink of an eye, three months are coming.

Although Ye Tian did not cultivate the fourth set of movements to the consummation realm, it was still far away, but he could last for a few minutes, and this kind of progress was very great.

......

Outside the Terran Supreme Temple.

A spaceship is docked here.

Ye Tian came here under the leadership of the Dark Lord and entered the spaceship.

And at the moment of entering the spaceship, I saw an acquaintance.

"His Highness Qin Chen!"

Seeing the old acquaintance, Ye Tian walked over.

"His Highness Wanfa!" His Highness Qin Chen also walked over with a smile when he saw Ye Tian.

"Your Highness Wanfa, I didn't expect you to come too!" Qin Chen was very surprised, according to his understanding, only His Highness above the True God level had the opportunity to enter the Heavenly Dao Fragment World, Ye Tian only had a god level, and he actually obtained a place.

However, thinking of Ye Tian's current strength, potential, and status, it is not too much to get a place.

"Your Highness Qin Chen, your aura is much stronger than before, you must have stepped into the Henggu-level Highness, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Luck!" His Royal Highness Qin Chen said with a smile: "I was lucky to survive in the Ruins World before, and I got a big opportunity, and then I transformed into an immortal clan, and my potential increased a little, so I stepped into the level of His Royal Highness of the Eternal Ancient Level in one fell swoop, and I can be regarded as returning to this level." I heard that the immortal inheritance was brought out by you from the ruins world, and I can be regarded as inheriting your favor!"

"What did His Highness Qin Chen say, even if you don't have the inheritance of the Immortal Clan, you still have the potential to return to Your Highness the Eternal Ancient Level!"

Ye Tian said.

"Hahaha, Your Highness Wanfa don't praise me falsely. I also know my potential, this time I was lucky enough to be promoted to the Eternal Ancient Highness, and when I come back from the Heavenly Dao Fragment World this time, I will no longer stay in this realm, and I will choose to impact the galaxy level. At the level of the Great God Level, I've stayed too long!" His Highness Qin Chen sighed.

The two chatted for a while, and the ship took off.

This time, among the six places in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, there were three places at the Great God level, two places at the True God level, and only one place at the God level, Ye Tian.

The speed of the spaceship is fast, the day has passed, and the destination has arrived!

......

South Cloud Domain.

One of the thirty-six domains of the Terrans, one is considered to be a star field in the upper middle range.

One after another, spaceships descended into a silent void, and immediately these spaceships came down one by one True God and Great God Level, these are the True God Level Inheritance Dao Zi and the Great God Level Inheritance Dao Zi of the major supreme strength, plus the six Highnesses of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race.

The inheritance Dao Zi of the Nine Supreme Forces, as well as the six Highnesses of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, did not make contact, but closed their eyes and pondered, waiting for the opening of the Heavenly Dao Fragment World.

A few hours later.

Rumble!!!!!

A venerable phantom descended, and it was the embodiment of the supreme.

"The Heavenly Dao Fragment World has been opened!"

The voices of the Supremes came.

Although the Heavenly Dao Fragment World has been opened, it is too deeply hidden, and it is naturally impossible to spy on it with the cultivation of Ye Tian and the others.

At this time, the power of the Supremes enveloped Ye Tian and the others, breaking through countless spaces and sending them into the Heavenly Dao Fragment World.

Crash!!!!

Ye Tian only felt that his eyes flickered, and he appeared in another void.

In this void, he felt an unprecedented oppression.

"The Heavenly Dao Fragment World has finally entered!"

Ye Tian muttered.
